# OneGlanse Documentation

> OneGlanse is the open-source GEO and AI visibility tracking platform. These docs cover setup, configuration, and deployment.

## What is OneGlanse?

OneGlanse monitors how your brand appears in real AI products — ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overview — using browser automation against the actual product UIs. It captures inline citations, ranked recommendations, brand framing, and competitor co-mentions that never appear in raw model API output.

It is open source (MIT), self-hosted, and free to run. All data stays on your own machine or VPS.

## Documentation pages

- Introduction: https://docs.oneglanse.com/introduction
- Getting started: https://docs.oneglanse.com/getting-started
- Local setup: https://docs.oneglanse.com/local-setup
- Self-hosted setup (VPS + Docker): https://docs.oneglanse.com/self-hosted-setup
- Environment variables: https://docs.oneglanse.com/environment-variables
- Troubleshooting: https://docs.oneglanse.com/troubleshooting
- API reference: https://docs.oneglanse.com/api-reference
